heading: Distribution of securities
label: 750 Distribution of securities
text: The trustee may not distribute a security except under .section 751 of this title
notes: senate report no. 95–989Section 750 forbids the trustee from distributing a security other than a customer name security. The term “distribution” refers to a distribution to customers in satisfaction of net equity claims and is not intended to preclude the trustee from liquidating securities under proposed .11 U.S.C. 748
